name_en: Style: 6703 Suede. ✨MCM✨ Mini Shopping Tote Crossbody Basket Bag
name_cn:
Style: 6703 Suede. ✨MCM✨ Mini Shopping Tote Crossbody Basket Bag
- New Basket Bag, Newly Released
This mini shopping tote features spacious compartments inside and out for your essentials. The cotton canvas lining is printed with a 🇨🇺 pattern inspired by street fashion. It comes with an included crossbody strap for hands-free convenience. Dimensions: 20.5x18.5x9.5
